landing.title: Welcome to ERS
landing.subtitle: Enhanced Rendering Solution for Unreal Engine
landing.description: ERS is a pure plugin rendering solution for Unreal Engine that enables full customization without modifying engine source code. Zero Shell operations, safe isolation, plug and play.
landing.plugAndPlayDesc: Pure plugin architecture with zero engine file modifications. 100% safe isolation through Unreal Engine's native plugin system. Compatible with UE 5.4-5.7.
landing.deferredDesc: Free mixing of main and auxiliary lights. Just two nodes to seamlessly blend with Lumen GI, with customizable lighting styles.
landing.forwardDesc: Full control over material appearance with custom HLSL support and advanced lighting options.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Explore the documentation to learn how to integrate ERS into your project.
landing.copyHint: Copy nodes directly to Unreal Engine
landing.faqQ1: Which UE versions does ERS support?
landing.faqA2: ERS is currently priced at $39.9, adjusting to $49.9 after mobile support is complete. One-time purchase includes full features and future updates.
landing.faqQ3: Which rendering pipelines is ERS compatible with?
landing.faqA3: ERS supports both deferred and forward rendering pipelines. You can choose the appropriate pipeline based on your project requirements.
landing.faqA4: ERS uses a pure plugin architecture with no Shell operations or engine file modifications. The plugin only runs in activated projects and will never interfere with other projects.
landing.faqQ5: Does ERS support lights inside blueprints?
landing.faqA5: Yes. ERS identifies lights through modifications to Unreal Engine's native rendering system, so even standard UE light components nested in Actors (like blueprints) are correctly recognized.
landing.style1Desc: UE Native PBR shading (Lambert diffuse + GGX specular)
landing.style2Desc: Smooth Toon style with adjustable smoothness using smoothstep transition
landing.style3Desc: Multi-step Toon style, supports 1-5 level anti-aliasing
landing.style4Desc: Retro-reflective material for signs and retroreflective surfaces
landing.customBxdfDesc: You can also use HLSL code to create your own BxDF and name them.
Uebp.copy: Copy selected node(s) with Ctrl +  C  and paste to Unreal Engine
